lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

The car is in good condition. The exterior is well-maintained with minimal wear. The interior is clean and shows standard signs of use. The engine and mechanical systems are in reliable working order.

This vehicle is in extraordinary, mint condition, essentially indistinguishable from a new car. The exterior paint retains its original factory luster with absolutely no swirls, scratches, or rock chips. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the leather seats show no signs of wear, the carpets are spotless, and all electronic features function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is flawless, having been stored in a climate-controlled garage and meticulously maintained with a full service history. This is a collector-grade example that has been preserved with the utmost care.

Experience perfection with this stunning, mint-condition vehicle! It truly looks and feels like it just left the showroom, with every detail meticulously cared for. The exterior is flawless, and the interior is absolutely immaculate. This is a rare opportunity to own a car in such incredible, like-new condition—truly a top-tier find for any driver!

The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor paint chips but no major body damage. The interior is clean with light wear on the upholstery. The engine and transmission are functioning correctly.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of its age and regular use. The exterior has several noticeable cosmetic blemishes, including small door dings and some minor paint fading on the hood. Inside, the cabin is functional but the seats show significant wear and some light staining. Mechanically, the car is reliable for daily commutes, though it will likely need minor service soon, such as new brake pads and a fresh set of tires. It represents a practical choice for a buyer who prioritizes utility over aesthetics.

This vehicle presents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning motorist, offering a seamless integration of mechanical integrity and refined aesthetic appeal. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected, this model exemplifies consistent performance and reliability within its class. It serves as an ideal selection for those seeking a premium driving experience without compromise. We invite you to command the road in a vehicle that sets a high standard for quality and value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in solid shape and has been really well-taken care of over the years—perfect for someone looking for a reliable car that still looks great on the road. I’ve loved every mile in it, but it’s time for a new adventure. Come take it for a spin, you’re going to love how it handles!

Used car in good condition. Reliable performance. Clean interior. Maintenance up to date. Title in hand.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of reliability and aesthetic appeal, perfect for someone seeking a dependable daily driver. Under the hood, the engine is responsive and has been meticulously maintained, offering a smooth and confident driving experience. The exterior features a clean, well-preserved finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections typical of a carefully driven car. Inside, you'll find a spacious and inviting cabin where all electronic features—from the climate control to the premium sound system—function perfectly. The upholstery is in great shape, showing minimal wear and no stains or tears. With a recent service history and plenty of tread left on the tires, this car is ready to hit the road immediately without any hidden surprises.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability. Offering a balanced combination of sophistication and durability, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking exceptional value without compromise.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has been subjected to rigorous multi-point inspections, ensuring it meets our exacting standards for performance and safety. Ideal for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber driving experience, this vehicle represents a superior balance of longevity and value. We invite you to experience the refined handling and sophisticated interior that define this exceptional offering.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been absolute gold. It’s in great shape, super reliable, and totally ready for its next adventure! I’ve taken really good care of it over the years, so you’re getting a solid, well-loved car that still looks and feels wonderful on the road. It's perfect if you're looking for quality and comfort without that 'brand new' price tag. Come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system for optimized torque across the powerband. The chassis has been enhanced with rear subframe reinforcement, addressing a common E46 weak point, and retains its factory limited-slip differential for superior power delivery through the rear wheels. Equipped with a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox, the drivetrain provides precise shift throws and mechanical engagement. Recent service includes a cooling system overhaul and valve adjustment. While the exterior reflects its enthusiast-driven history, the mechanical components are dialed in for peak performance and structural rigidity.
Used car. Good condition. Mechanically sound. Minimal wear. Clean title.

This vehicle is a remarkable find for any driver seeking a balance of reliability and performance. The exterior presents beautifully, maintaining its original luster with only minor, negligible imperfections that one would expect from a well-loved car. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and well-preserved; the upholstery shows minimal wear, and all interior electronics, including the infotainment and climate control systems, operate flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from a documented history of consistent maintenance and recent fluid services. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a composed, quiet ride on both city streets and highways. Equipped with tires that possess significant tread depth and brakes that respond with precision, this car is ready for the road immediately. It represents a fantastic opportunity to own a high-quality vehicle that has been treated with genuine care by its previous owner.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been meticulously maintained to ensure peak operational integrity. Featuring a comprehensive service history and refined aesthetics, it offers a superior driving experience for the discerning professional. This unit represents a premier opportunity to acquire a high-caliber vehicle that balances performance with enduring value.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been meticulously maintained to ensure sustained mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. It represents a superior acquisition for the discerning driver, offering a harmonious balance of performance and long-term value. Our rigorous multi-point inspection confirms that this unit remains in commendable condition, ready for immediate delivery and dependable service.

Hey everyone! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. If you’re looking for something that’s been well-cared for and is ready to hit the road today, this is the one for you! Let’s get you behind the wheel!

Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean interior. Reliable runner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a fantastic balance of reliability and modern comfort. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful, regular use. Inside, the smoke-free cabin is remarkably clean, featuring well-preserved upholstery and high-quality materials that show very little wear. All electronic components, including the infotainment system, premium audio, and climate control, are fully operational. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; it has been serviced at regular intervals, providing a smooth, quiet ride with responsive handling and firm braking. With a documented history of preventative maintenance and recent tire rotations, this car is ready for the road and requires no immediate attention.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been meticulously curated to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Hey there! Thanks so much for stopping by to check out my car! I’ve absolutely loved driving this beauty, and it’s been super reliable for me. It’s in really solid shape, runs like a dream, and has clearly been well-loved and looked after. It’s perfect for someone who wants a dependable, sharp-looking ride without the brand-new price tag. I’m honestly a little sad to see it go, but I’m excited for it to find a great new home! Feel free to shoot me a message if you have any questions or want to come take a look!

Up for sale is a mechanically robust E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, renowned for its individual throttle bodies and high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. This driver-focused example utilizes the Getrag 6-speed manual transmission paired with a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential. Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Regular maintenance performed. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and presents beautifully, offering a perfect balance of luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, mirror-like luster, with only minor stone chips on the front fascia that reflect honest, careful use. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary; the leather upholstery is supple and free of tears, the dashboard is crack-free, and every electronic component—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system—functions flawlessly. Mechanically, it is in excellent health, featuring a comprehensive service history, a smooth-shifting transmission, and a set of high-quality tires with significant tread life remaining. It has been kept in a smoke-free, pet-free environment and is ready for its next owner to drive away with complete confidence.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a balanced synthesis of performance and long-term value. Fully inspected to ensure compliance with our rigorous standards, this selection remains a reliable choice for those seeking quality without compromise.
